channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Pakistan eyes narrow window to resuscitate US-Iran talks after breakdown
item.description: US and Iran end marathon Islamabad talks without agreement, leaving fragile ceasefire under growing strain.

item.title: At least six killed in Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon
item.description: Attacks come as Israel says it is close to taking over a major town in the south, and before peace talks in the US.

item.title: Tear gas fired at India workers demanding higher wages as living costs rise
item.description: Factory workers protest in national capital's suburb of Noida as living costs across the world rise due to the Iran war.

item.title: How the US-Iran talks in Islamabad unfolded
item.description: Pakistan has been under the spotlight as it managed what others couldn’t due to its ties with the Gulf, US and China.

item.title: Iran’s army says US plan to blockade Hormuz ‘amounts to piracy’
item.description: The US restrictions on maritime navigation and transit in international waters are illegal, Iranian military says.

item.title: Starmer says UK will not support US blockade of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Other US allies criticise Trump's move, including France, Spain and Turkiye, and China also condemns the plan.

item.title: US blockade of Iran would worsen global energy crisis, analysts say
item.description: While US military says it will blockade Iranian ports only, move would have ripples worldwide, according to analysts.

item.title: What Iran is saying about US plan to blockade ports
item.description: Iran’s military has called US blockade plans in the Strait of Hormuz an “act of piracy”.

item.title: Refugee in my own city: Surviving Tehran’s bombing, with my cat for company
item.description: Despite the relentless bombing, Sana refuses to flee Tehran, clinging to resilience and fleeting moments of normalcy.

item.title: Ghanaian footballer Dominic Frimpong killed in armed attack on team bus
item.description: Berekum Chelsea's Dominic Frimpong died when armed robbers attacked the Ghana Premier League team travelling home.
